content.en:
Ye Tian had always wanted to get the god-level extreme strength talent, and now he had finally copied it.

He was very curious about what the so-called extreme strength talent was all about, and why it could far surpass the strength talent of the same level.

Before, he couldn't know, but now that he has copied the god-level extreme strength talent, as long as he communicates this talent, he will immediately know the reason.

Immediately, Ye Tian communicated with the god-level extreme strength talent that he had just copied in his hand to understand the essence of this talent.

Soon, Ye Tian thoroughly understood the god-level extreme strength talent.

"Incredible!!

Ye Tian's eyes widened, extremely shocked.

It turns out that everyone has talents, but the potential of a talent may not be able to be exerted, such as the Armagind-level strength talent, once this talent is opened, it seems to increase the strength by 100 times, but in fact, the potential of the Armagishn-level strength talent is far more than 100 times, but the body of each creature is not completely suitable for the Armagishn-level strength talent, and there is no way to completely stimulate the potential of the Armagishn-level strength talent.

Therefore, the talents possessed by the creatures of the universe are all talents that have not fully unlocked their potential, but once they have unlocked their full potential, their power is far beyond that of the same level.

For example, the source beasts of the origin realm can fully exert the potential of the strength talent, almost every source beast has the ultimate strength talent, and this is not because these source beasts have unique talents, high qualifications, and can tap potential, but the gift of the origin of the universe.

The Cosmic Origin completely sealed the physical body in the Origin Realm, causing the Origin Realm to be special, thus stimulating the power and innate potential of each Origin Realm Source Beast.

Of course, the Source Beasts have unique potential in their strength talents, but they have also lost other things, such as their understanding of the Great Dao and their wisdom, which is also the suppression of the Origin of the Universe.

Otherwise, the source beasts of the origin realm are too talented, wouldn't they all be able to become anti-heaven existences, and wouldn't they rush out of the source beast realm and occupy the main space of the universe when the time comes.

In this case, how could the Origin of the Universe suppress the cultivation path of the Thirteenth Universe Era, and how could it protect itself?

The thirteenth cosmic epoch is a new era of reincarnation, and the cosmic origin of this epoch is the weakest, if too many terrible existences are born and share a part of the origin, it will cause the cosmic origin to become weaker and weaker, and in the end, it may even be suppressed by cosmic beings.

For example, if many transcendents are born, they will even be killed into the cosmic origin space by a group of transcendents, just like the original Yuntan Heavenly Monarch, who entered the cosmic origin space and cut off a trace of the cosmic origin.

Therefore, under the operation of the Origin of the Universe, it would naturally suppress the other cultivation paths of the Origin Realm.

......

"Hahaha, it's really lucky, if I hadn't come to the Origin Realm, I wouldn't have known that there is a limit to talent, and I don't know the limit of not being able to develop talent. This time, I copied the god-level extreme strength talent, and my strength instantly improved a lot, and I made a lot of money!"

Ye Tian was quite excited.

If there is a super-god-level extreme space-time talent for him to copy, it will be even more seconds.

But imagination also knows that it is impossible, the super-god-level space-time talent is estimated to be only him, and it is impossible to give birth to another one, let alone the super-god-level extreme space-time talent.

If you enter the chaos, you may still hope to meet such a talent.

But for now, there is no hope at all.

"The Triangle Blood Bull King is so special, he actually has a god-level extreme strength talent, it's better to catch it and interrogate it, maybe there will be an unexpected gain!"

Ye Tian thought so, and immediately went to the underground space where the Triangle Blood Bull King was located.

Along the way, the other triangular blood cows saw Ye Tian and tried to stop them, but they were all knocked away by Ye Tian.

A group of high-level source beast scum, no matter how large the number is, it can't pose any threat to him, if it is a group of source emperors, he will definitely leave immediately, and he will not dare to provoke.

"It's too weak!"

Ye Tian blasted away a large number of triangular blood cows with one punch, and soon came to the underground space where the triangular blood bull king was located.

And at this moment, the Triangle Blood Bull King had already woken up and discovered Ye Tian, an intruder.

Rumble!!!

The Triangle Blood Bull King slammed into it directly.

As a source beast of the origin realm, it doesn't have any fancy means of attack, it just hits directly, it is directly reckless!

Ye Tian didn't use any means, but put on a straight fist move, mobilized the strength of his body and his strength talent, and aimed a punch at the three long horns that the Triangle Blood Bull King collided with.

Click!!

The three horns of the Triangle Blood Bull King snapped, and its body flew upside down.

Not only that, but its powerful body began to crack, but fortunately, Ye Tian's subordinates showed mercy and did not use all their strength, otherwise the punch just now would have been enough to beat it into a blood mist.

After severely invading this triangular blood bull king, Ye Tian teleported over, grabbed the other party, and immediately sucked into the Chaos Ancient Realm, suppressing it.

Then, Ye Tian left here, otherwise, the triangular blood cow clan here would attack him in a steady stream.

Although he didn't take these weak triangular blood bull kings in his eyes, he didn't want to waste time, and once he fought for a long time, who knew if he would provoke a Yuan Ancestor.

He didn't want to meet the Yuan Ancestor now, otherwise he would definitely die!

After flying for a long time, Ye Tiancai landed on a silent hill, and immediately his consciousness entered the Chaos Ancient Realm and began to interrogate the triangular blood bull king.

"Tell me, how did you get your god-level extreme strength talent?"

After Ye Tian hypnotized the Triangle Blood Bull King, he asked.

He had expected this Triangle Blood Bull King to say that his god-level extreme strength talent was innate, but he got an answer that surprised him immensely.

"It was promoted by absorbing the original well water!"

The soul of the Triangle Blood Bull King informed Ye Tian of the answer with the voice of the soul.

"What, the source of the well water !!!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

The water of the Origin Well should be the water inside the Well of Origin, and the Triangle Blood Bull King actually got the Origin Well water, doesn't it mean that the Triangle Blood Bull King has entered the Origin Well?

"Do you know where the Well of Origin is?"

Ye Tian asked.

"I know that a well of origin is the secret of our Triangle Blood Cow Clan, and only the inheritors of the Triangle Blood Cow King are qualified to know there!"

Triangle Blood Bull King Road.

"Take me to the Well of Origin!"

Ye Tian ordered.

"Yes!"

The Triangle Blood Bull King replied.

Immediately, Ye Tian released the Triangle Blood Bull King and let it lead the way.

The Triangle Blood Bull King, who was completely destroyed, would not resist at all and honestly led the way.
